meta.title: Security Guards vs. Motion Detectors: Depth or Breadth in ICS Security Monitoring
meta.description:
In ICS, there is a very large set of applications and devices, and corresponding data, that can be monitored to detect cyber threats and incidents. At this S4xEurope session Dan Scali of FireEye looks at the pro's and con's of going deep in a selected area or plant or monitoring less but covering all sites with the resources you have allocated to detection and response.

At 19:30 he proposes an ICS network security monitoring (NSM) maturity model that is worth a look as well.
